overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Ultra Short Municipal Income ETF (GUMI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that focuses on municipal securities, which are exempt from federal income tax. The fund aims to maintain an average portfolio duration of .5 years (about 6 months) GUMI was launched on Jul 23, 2024 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
